description_long: This is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a two-tone finish, featuring a matte black slide and a tan polymer frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured with textured panels and finger grooves for enhanced handling, and it displays a 'GEAR' logo at the base. The slide is engraved with model information and has prominent serrations for improved manipulation. An accessory rail under the barrel holds a mounted tactical light or laser module, adding to its tactical utility. The trigger guard is robust and slightly undercut, providing space for a secure grip. The overall design is compact, with visible iron sights and a squared-off trigger guard for control and comfort.
description: A compact, two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, black slide, and mounted tactical accessory. Features detailed slide engravings and a robust trigger guard.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the tan grip with finger grooves, black slide with engravings, and a mounted tactical light/laser on the accessory rail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the iron sights, slide serrations, and the width of the grip and slide.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the slide markings, ergonomic grip, and the tactical accessory mounted under the barrel.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the barrel muzzle, tactical accessory lens, and the front sight post.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of tan polymer with pronounced ergonomic contouring, including finger grooves and a textured stippled surface for secure handling. The lower portion of the grip features a 'GEAR' logo, and the backstrap is gently arched for comfort. The sides of the grip have a checkered pattern, and the base is slightly flared for improved retention. The overall design emphasizes both control and comfort, with visible seams and molded details.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is robust and slightly squared-off, with a gentle undercut at the rear to allow a higher grip on the frame. It is thick and solid, providing ample space for gloved fingers, and features a smooth finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement. The front of the guard is flat, suitable for a support-hand finger placement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length for a compact handgun, with a non-threaded, smooth exterior profile. The muzzle is flush with the slide, and there are no visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads. The finish matches the matte black of the slide, and the barrel is recessed slightly within the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features several prominent engravings: 'XD-9' and 'SUB-COMPACT' on the left side, 'XD 9 3'' and 'SPRINGFIELD ARMORY U.S.A.' on the right side, and additional serial number and caliber designations. The markings are deeply etched and highly visible, with a clean, modern font style.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with a slight flare at the rear, providing a stable platform for the hand. It is integrated into the grip's contour and features a textured surface for easy removal. The base is marked with the 'GEAR' logo and has beveled edges for comfort and smooth insertion.
